overall.description: Cinematic first-person exploration of a sci-fi industrial research facility in a game engine. The player walks from a covered communal lounge up a metal staircase into laboratory spaces filled with hydroponic plants, computer workstations, and scientific equipment, eventually approaching a scientist examining whale data on a large monitor.

scene_state.functional_zone: communal lounge with scattered floor cushions

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered lounge area with colorful cushions on the floor, heading toward a metal staircase

entered.detail: tattered fabric roof covering the lounge area with light filtering through
scattered cushions and mats in various colors on the concrete floor
yellow and gray metal structural beams supporting the canopy
wide industrial staircase with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered communal lounge with fabric canopies overhead and colorful cushions scattered on the concrete floor. The player walks forward toward a large metal staircase, with industrial support beams visible on either side and a view of the outside street visible through the open front of the shelter.

events.description: begins ascending the metal staircase from the lounge area
reaches the top of the stairs where lighting becomes brighter

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide metal staircase with yellow safety lines, passing industrial piping

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on the left side of the stairs, one appears to be tending to a child

entered.detail: silver metal handrails lining both sides of the staircase
thick yellow and gray pipes running along the walls
triangular warning sign mounted on the wall near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide industrial staircase with metal railings and yellow safety lines. Two NPCs sit on the left side of the stairs. Industrial piping runs along the concrete walls, and a warning sign is visible. The lighting shifts from mixed to artificial as the player climbs toward the upper level.

events.description: exits staircase into upper corridor with visible piping and vegetation
passes through laboratory doors into the research area

agents.ego_description: walking along a metal catwalk corridor lined with hydroponic plants and industrial equipment

entered.detail: metal grate flooring with yellow safety markings
large orange industrial double doors with mesh windows
metal racks with potted plants and growing vegetation
hanging sign indicating the research area ahead

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the player enters a corridor with metal grate flooring and industrial pipes overhead. Hydroponic plant stations line the walls. The player approaches large orange laboratory doors beneath a hanging 'Research Area' sign, transitioning into the main laboratory space.

scene_state.functional_zone: research laboratory with computer terminals and workbenches

events.description: turns toward a scientist working at a computer terminal

agents.ego_description: exploring the laboratory interior, passing workstations and hydroponic setups while approaching a scientist

notable_agents.action: scientist in white lab coat working at a computer terminal

entered.detail: desks with monitors and scientific equipment
fabric drapes hanging from the industrial ceiling
tall metal racks holding supplies and equipment
large glass partition looking into another laboratory area

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious laboratory with metal grate floors and fabric canopies overhead. Computer workstations and metal shelving units fill the space. A scientist in a white lab coat works at a terminal ahead. The player moves through the lab, passing hydroponic plants and glass observation windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: laboratory observation deck with large monitor

events.description: approaches and examines large curved monitor displaying whale imagery
turns away from monitor and begins walking back through the lab

agents.ego_description: approaching a large monitor displaying whale data, observing it closely, then turning to exit

notable_agents.action: scientist standing at computer terminal examining data on screen

entered.detail: wide curved display showing whale imagery and scientific data readouts

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a scientist working at a large curved monitor displaying detailed whale imagery and scientific data. After observing the screen, the player turns and begins walking back through the laboratory, passing hydroponic plant stations and returning toward the main lab area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a relaxed communal lounge into the sterile, high-tech environment of a scientific research laboratory. It begins among fabric canopies and colorful cushions on a concrete floor, moving forward past industrial support beams toward a wide metal staircase. As the camera ascends the stairs past seated figures and yellow safety lines, the natural light of the outdoors fades into artificial illumination and industrial piping. The scene then shifts into a corridor of metal grates and hydroponic stations before passing through large orange doors into a spacious lab filled with workstations and glass observation windows. Finally, the camera approaches a scientist analyzing whale imagery on a curved monitor before turning back to retrace its steps through the greenery of the laboratory.
